nodes.name: Create implementation plan
nodes.prompt: Analyze the codebase and create a detailed plan for adding a GET /api/users/:id/profile endpoint. Include file locations, data model changes, and validation requirements.

nodes.name: Implement profile endpoint
nodes.prompt: Implement the user profile endpoint based on the plan. Create the route handler, data model, and any necessary middleware.

nodes.name: Write endpoint tests
nodes.prompt: Write comprehensive tests for the profile endpoint covering happy path, error cases, auth, and validation.

nodes.name: Security review
nodes.prompt: Review the implementation for security issues: injection, auth bypass, data leaks, rate limiting.
